heroTitle: Helping Organisations Deliver Projects, Improve Operations, and Achieve Strategic Results
heroText: Civoris Consulting provides structured project management and business consulting support to organisations seeking operational clarity, efficient execution, and sustainable growth.
introTitle: Professional Consulting With an International Perspective
introText1: If there's one thing I'm certain of, it's that great businesses are built on great systems.
introText2: I'm Fulgence Mazie, though most people call me Clyde. As a Chartered Manager (CMgr MCMI) and Project Management Professional (PMP®), with a First-Class Honours degree in Business and Management from the University of Derby in England, I have spent the last decade helping organisations navigate complex challenges through strategic project management and business consulting. I am also currently pursuing a master's degree in Development Studies and Diplomacy at the Universitat Oberta de Catalunya in Spain.
introText3: My approach is based on helping businesses manage complexity by balancing clear governance with the flexibility to adapt. Because I work across Agile approaches, including Scrum, as well as Waterfall and Hybrid methodologies, I do not believe in one-size-fits-all frameworks. Instead, I tailor the delivery strategy to what the organisation and the project actually need.
introText3b: Depending on the project, I use Agile and Scrum for service development, digital projects and operational improvements where requirements are likely to evolve through stakeholder feedback. I apply Waterfall when the scope, budget and technical requirements are clearly defined, such as in construction, regulatory implementation or infrastructure delivery. For major organisational transformations, I use a Hybrid approach that combines structured planning and financial control with iterative testing and continuous improvement.
introText3c: From planning and risk mitigation to rigorous budget management and stakeholder engagement, I help ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, within budget and to a high standard. Ultimately, I specialise in turning frustrating bottlenecks into streamlined, high-performing workflows.
introText3d: Based in Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire, my practice focuses on driving operational excellence within the high-growth business environments of West Africa. I specialise in developing tailor-made delivery strategies for high-stakes sectors, including:
sector1Desc: Orchestrating complex digital transformations, compliance integrations and scalable infrastructure rollouts where precision and rapid time to market are critical.
sector2Desc: Diagnosing cross-border bottlenecks, streamlining supply networks and implementing workflow automation to reduce operational friction.
sector3Desc: Structuring robust monitoring, evaluation and reporting frameworks that align international stakeholder funding with measurable, ground-level community impact.
introText4: When I'm not optimising business systems or playing football, I apply the same diagnostic mindset to a hands-on hobby: learning diesel mechanics. Whether I'm troubleshooting a high-pressure common-rail injection system or fine-tuning a project timeline, I simply enjoy working out how complex components fit together to achieve peak performance.
introText5: If you're looking for a trusted partner to improve project delivery, streamline operations or lead organisational change with confidence, I'd be delighted to discuss how Civoris Consulting can help you achieve your goals.
qual1Text: Project Management Professional (PMP®) certification demonstrating internationally recognised project leadership expertise.
qual2Text: First Class degree in Business and Management from the University of Derby, United Kingdom.
qual4Text: Master's degree (M.A.) in Development Studies and Diplomacy, from Universitat Oberta de Catalunya, Spain.
qual3Text: Chartered Manager (CMgr), awarded by the Chartered Management Institute, London, United Kingdom.
gallery1Caption: Facilitating a project needs & issues workshop with a client project team.
gallery2Caption: Delivering training and stakeholder briefings in the field.
support1Text: Structured planning, timelines, execution strategies, and delivery coordination.
support2Text: Improving efficiency, reducing process friction, and strengthening organisational workflows.
support3Text: Supporting communication, alignment, and collaboration across teams and partners.
support4Text: Helping organisations execute projects and operational initiatives effectively.
support5Text: Designing more efficient systems and scalable operational structures.
support6Text: Supporting structured delivery of business and operational initiatives.
step1Text: Analyse operational challenges, objectives, and organisational priorities.
step2Text: Develop practical and structured solutions aligned with business goals.
step3Text: Support effective execution with clarity, accountability, and coordination.
step4Text: Monitor outcomes and continuously improve systems and processes.

value2Text: Ability to operate effectively across cultures, sectors, and environments.

ctaTitle: Looking for Structured Project & Operational Support?
ctaText: Civoris Consulting works with organisations seeking practical consulting support, stronger operational systems, and effective project delivery.
